data.title: MCME Carell completes acquisition of City Office REIT for $7 per share; stock no longer listed publicly.
data.description: A partnership between Elliott Investment Management L.P. and Morning Calm Management, LLC, known as MCME Carell, has successfully finalized the acquisition of City Office REIT, Inc. data.title: Tianma displays new smartphone AM-OLED tech at CES 2026, promising improved brightness, color reproduction, and efficiency.
data.description: At the Consumer Electronics Show (CES) in Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, Tianma, a major player in flat panel display manufacturing, showcased their latest advancements in AM-OLED displays. These new displays are tailored to enhance brightness, color reproduction, efficiency, and form factor specifically for smartphone usage. The demonstrations at CES highlighted the significant improvements in these areas, drawing attention to Tianma's cutting-edge technology in the field of display production.

data.title: Insmed Inc plans aggressive growth by 2026, with Brinsupri generating $172.7 million in 2025 and $144.6 million in first quarter.
data.description: Insmed Inc revealed a strategic plan for 2026, focusing on its respiratory product line and upcoming trial results and releases that could impact growth over the next 18 months. The company reported preliminary revenues of $172.7 million for Brinsupri in 2025 and around $144.6 million for the initial quarter after FDA approval in August 2025. Brinsupri, a medication for non-cystic fibrosis bronchiectasis in patients 12 years and older, has contributed to Insmed's positive stock performance. CEO Will Lewis noted that 2025 marked a pivotal year for the company in translating scientific progress into commercial success. This development was discussed ahead of Insmed's presentation at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

data.title: Westwood One to air NFL Wild Card Weekend, presented by Verizon, covering all 6 games.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the US has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past 10 years. The job market experienced an addition of 250,000 new jobs last month alone, exceeding expectations. This boost in employment has led to a significant increase in consumer spending, with retail sales up by 5% compared to the previous year. The strong performance of the labor market and the economy as a whole has raised hopes for continued growth and stability in the foreseeable future.

data.title: LG showcases 'Design for All' at CES 2026, unveiling LG Comfort Kit accessories for improved appliance experience.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, LG Electronics USA showcased their dedication to inclusive innovation by introducing an extended range of LG Comfort Kit accessories. These tech accessories are designed to enhance appliance experiences and overcome accessibility barriers. LG aims to provide a more intuitive and improved user experience through these products.

data.title: Columbia School Fair on Jan. 24 to showcase 50+ school options for parents and kids in South Carolina.
data.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. - On January 9, 2026, parents in Columbia are invited to explore various educational options for their children at the upcoming Columbia School fair on Saturday, January 24. The event will commence at 11:00 am at the Brookland Baptist Church, showcasing over 50 public and charter schools in one convenient location. This initiative aims to provide valuable information for parents seeking educational prospects for their kids.

data.title: BCG and Hippocratic AI join forces to utilize agentic AI in biopharma and medtech industries.
data.description: In San Francisco, an innovative collaboration has been announced between Hippocratic AI and BCG. This partnership aims to merge Hippocratic AI's focus on safety and healthcare technology with BCG's proficiency in strategic planning, operations, and AI advancements. This move is set to bring about synergies in the realms of artificial intelligence and healthcare, promising significant advancements in the field.

data.title: Avosina Healthcare Solutions in Lorton, VA, alerts individuals about a data breach affecting personal info, starting Jan 9, 2026.
data.description: In Lorton, Virginia, on January 9, 2026, Avosina Healthcare Solutions ("Avosina") announced a privacy breach affecting certain individuals. The company has started sending out written notifications to potentially impacted individuals regarding the incident. The breach involves the compromise of personal information of a specific number of individuals, and the notifications aim to alert and inform those affected.

data.title: Illuminate Rx, a PBM affiliate of RxBenefits, appoints Ritu Malhotra, PharmD, as President. She brings over 20 years of experience.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on January 9, 2026, Illuminate Rx, a pharmacy benefits manager (PBM) associated with RxBenefits, Inc., revealed the selection of Ritu Malhotra, PharmD, as their President. Malhotra brings over 20 years of expertise in revolutionizing healthcare and pharmacy services.

data.title: ESCA praises Trump Admin for 15% global tax exemption for US companies, with agreement from 145+ countries.
data.description: Earlier this week, a "side-by-side" agreement was disclosed by the OECD involving over 145 countries. This agreement exempts all U.S. companies from the recent 15% tax on global income for multinational corporations. The cooperation among the countries is aimed at fiscal harmony and fair taxation practices.

data.title: China meat and poultry market report for 2025 includes PESTEL analysis, producers, import/export data, wholesalers, and consumers.
data.description: A report titled "Meat and Poultry Market in China: Business Report 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the analysis of China's meat and poultry market, providing a brief country profile with essential economic indicators and insights into the business environment. It evaluates the market through various aspects such as domestic production, consumption, and projects future developments. This comprehensive report offers valuable insights into the meat and poultry market landscape in China.

data.title: Ripple authorized by FCA to expand crypto payments in the UK, achieving regulatory approval for its business.
data.description: Ripple has received approval from the UK's Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) to expand its payments business operations. This regulatory approval will allow Ripple to accelerate its growth and operations in the UK market. The approval signifies a significant milestone for Ripple as it continues to establish itself as a key player in the fintech industry. This development highlights Ripple's commitment to compliance and regulatory standards, paving the way for increased adoption of its payment solutions. The approval from the FCA is expected to have a positive impact on Ripple's business, enabling it to provide its services to a larger customer base in the UK.
